Interpretation et validation
Analyse synthetique du bilan le plus recent : Glucose [Mass/volume] in Blood eleve; Creatinine [Mass/volume] in Blood eleve;
Triglyceride [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma eleve; Cholesterol [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma eleve. Les resultats
ci-dessus doivent etre interpretes dans le contexte clinique du patient. Antecedents ou contexte associe : Metabolic syndrome
X (disorder), Medication review due (situation), Normal pregnancy (finding), Reports of violence in the environment (finding).
